actionCalls.description: Throw Error that Main Contact is missing if main contact is not present by the time user clicks on Finish button in contacts screen.
actionCalls.name: MainConMissingConScreen
actionCalls.label: MainConMissingConScreen

value.stringValue: Site doesn't have a Main Contact. Please add or edit contacts to choose a Main Contact.
Looks like you have missed a piece of information
We require the job title and job description as minimum
There are no Contacts to Edit
There are no Contacts to Remove
This Contact is a Main Contact so cant be removed
Please ensure you have selected a Job Role
Blue Arrow - Conditions of Business – Flexible Workers
Blue Arrow - Health and Safety Form

decisions.description: Check if Main Contact Screen from the updated site value when user clicks on finish button
decisions.name: Check_if_Main_Con_Exists_in_Con_Screen
decisions.label: Check if Main Con Exists in Con Screen

Flow.description: MainContact Changes and Fields required on contact screen
Flow.label: Public Flow - Client Form

recordLookups.description: Get Updated Site when user clicks on finish button in main contacts screen
recordLookups.name: Get_Updated_Site_Con_Screen
recordLookups.label: Get Updated Site Con Screen

fields.name: Contacttext2
fields.fieldText: Add New Contact﻿

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name:

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name:

fields.name: JobTitle
fields.fieldText: Job Title:

fields.name: Make_this_person_my_Main_Contact
fields.fieldText: Make this person my Main Contact (this will send a copy of our Conditions of Business to this Contact for completion)

screens.name: Contacts_Screen_0
screens.label: Contacts Screen

fields.name: Contacttext2_0
fields.fieldText:
﻿Contact Details﻿

Add the Contact(s) who we will need to engage with before, during and after supplying workers by clicking the "Add Contact" button below. Please ensure you add a main contact in order to complete this section.

fields.name: MainContact2
fields.fieldText: Current Main Contact: ﻿{!MainContact}

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Click to Add Contact","value":"Add Contact","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand-outline","iconName":"utility:adduser","index":0},{"label":"Click to Edit Contact","value":"Edit Contact","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","iconName":"utility:edit","index":1},{"label":"Click to Remove Contact","value":"Remove Contact","iconPosition":"left","variant":"destructive","iconName":"utility:clear","index":2}]
[{"label":"Click once finished to return to main page","value":"ConScreenFinishBtn","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","index":0}]

screens.nextOrFinishButtonLabel: Click once finished to return to the main page

fields.name: Contacttext2_0_0
fields.fieldText: ﻿Edit Contact Details

fields.name: EditFirstName
fields.fieldText: First Name:

fields.name: EditLastName
fields.fieldText: Last Name:

fields.name: EditTitle
fields.fieldText: Job Title:

fields.name: EditMain
fields.fieldText: Make this person my Main Contact

fields.name: Display1_0
fields.fieldText:
Invoice Details

Add information about where and who you would like invoices to be sent to below.

fields.name: What_is_the_company_s_registration_number
fields.fieldText: Company Registration Number:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure this is 10 characters or less

fields.name: InvoiceCompany_0
fields.fieldText: Which Company Name do you want on Invoices:

fields.name: Invoice_Contact_0
fields.fieldText: Who do you want Invoices addressed to:

value.stringValue: What email do you want Invoices sent to:
Is there a Phone number for Invoicing:
Is there a Mobile number for Invoicing:

fields.name: InvoiceText_0
fields.fieldText: Invoice Address

fields.name: Streeti
fields.fieldText: Street

fields.name: Cityi
fields.fieldText: City

fields.name: Post_Codei
fields.fieldText: Post Code

fields.name: Countyi
fields.fieldText: County

fields.name: Countryi
fields.fieldText: Country

fields.name: Do_you_use_purchase_order_numbers
fields.fieldText: Do you use purchase order numbers?

fields.name: Header6
fields.fieldText:
Add New Job Role

Blue Arrow operates on a pay and invoicing week of Sat-Fri, if this is not acceptable, speak to your consultant

fields.name: JobPick
fields.fieldText: Please choose the Job Title:

value.stringValue: Please provide a short Job Description

fields.name: PPE
fields.fieldText: Personal Protective Equipment requirements for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

fields.name: HS
fields.fieldText: Notified Health & Safety Risks for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

fields.name: Inductions
fields.fieldText: Special Inductions needed for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

screens.name: Job_Role_Screen_0
screens.label: Job Role Screen

fields.name: Header6_0
fields.fieldText:
Job Details

Add the Job(s) which you would like us to supply workers for by clicking the "Add Job" button below.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Click to Add Job","value":"Add Role","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand-outline","iconName":"utility:add","index":0},{"label":"Click to Edit Job","value":"Edit Job Role","iconPosition":"left","variant":"neutral","iconName":"utility:edit","index":1},{"label":"Click to Remove Job","value":"Delete Job Role","iconPosition":"left","variant":"destructive","iconName":"utility:clear","index":2}]

screens.nextOrFinishButtonLabel: Click once finished to return to the main page

fields.name: Header6_0_0
fields.fieldText: Edit Job Role

fields.name: JobPick_Edit
fields.fieldText: Please choose the Job Title:

value.stringValue: Please provide a Job Description for this role:

fields.name: PPE_Edit
fields.fieldText: Personal Protective Equipment requirements for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

fields.name: HS_Edit
fields.fieldText: Notified Health & Safety Risks for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

fields.name: Inductions_Edit
fields.fieldText: Special Inductions needed for this role:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter text with a maximum character limit of 255.

fields.name: Display1
fields.fieldText:
﻿Site Details

Add the details of your Site which you would like us to supply workers to below.

fields.name: SiteAddress
fields.fieldText: Site Address:

fields.name: Street
fields.fieldText: Street

fields.name: City
fields.fieldText: City:

fields.name: Post_Code
fields.fieldText: Post Code:

fields.name: County
fields.fieldText: County

fields.name: Country
fields.fieldText: Country

fields.name: Check_here_if_this_is_the_same_Address_for_invoicing
fields.fieldText: Check here if this is the same Address for invoicing

fields.name: LocationNotes
fields.fieldText: Are there any additional access requirements for this Site we should know about:
fields.helpText: For example gate codes, specific warehouse entrances etc.

fields.name: Who_is_the_Health_and_Safety_Contact
fields.fieldText: Who is the Health and Safety Contact:

value.stringValue: What Email address can we use to send a Health and Safety form for completion:

fields.name: WelcomeText
fields.fieldText: New Client Details

fields.name: CompleteText
fields.fieldText: We have all the information we need, feel free to close this page.

fields.name: NotCompleteText
fields.fieldText:
We need to collect the following information:

Site Details - Address and Health and Safety contact

Invoice Details - Who and where to send Invoices to

Contact Details - At least 1 Main Contact must be added

Job Details - Add all Jobs for which you require workers

textTemplates.name: Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!GetSite.Owner:User.FirstName},


Your client has completed their onboarding for the following site: {!GetSite.Name}

textTemplates.name: COBBODY
textTemplates.text:
Conditions of Business

 

Dear {!First_Name},

 

Please click on the link below to read and acknowledge Blue Arrow’s Conditions of

Business for the Supply of Flexible Workers:

 

Conditions of Business for the Supply of Flexible Workers


 

Kind Regards

 

{!GetSite.Owner:User.FirstName} {!GetSite.Owner:User.LastName}

{!GetSite.Owner:User.Title}

T: {!GetSite.Owner:User.Phone}

W: bluearrow.co.uk

800 The

Boulevard, Capability Green, Luton, Bedfordshire, LU1 3BA

Leading

the way in creating innovative, inclusive workforce solutions.

textTemplates.name: HSBody
textTemplates.text:
To Whom It May Concern

Blue Arrow requires you to complete a Health and Safety form for the site {!GetSite.Name}

You can complete this form electronically by clicking the link below:

Click Here

Kind Regards

{!GetSite.Owner:User.FirstName} {!GetSite.Owner:User.LastName}


{!GetSite.Owner:User.Title}


T: {!GetSite.Owner:User.Phone}




W: bluearrow.co.uk


Cubix, Hampton by Hilton, 42-50 Kimpton Road, Luton, Bedfordshire, LU2 0FP


Leading the way in creating innovative, inclusive workforce solutions.
